nl_query: Count revaluation extensions approved per board.
failed_sql: SELECT b.id AS board_id, COUNT(der.id) AS approved_extensions FROM board b JOIN deadline_extension_request der ON der.board_id = b.id WHERE der.approval_status = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY approved_extensions DESC
